project_context.target_audience: Premium event planners in India, primarily Delhi NCR. Age 25-45, high disposable income. iPhone users.
project_context.description: Convert the current VenuLoQ mobile web experience into a polished native-feeling iPhone app without a full redesign. Focus on mobile usability, tab bar navigation, tight app headers, and clear CTA hierarchies.

guidelines.headings: Use 'Cormorant Garamond' for all main headings. Apply tracking-tight for elegance. Avoid aggressive bolding; stick to font-medium (500) or font-semibold (600) to maintain an editorial, premium feel.
guidelines.body: Use 'DM Sans' for readability in dense sections like venue details. Apply tracking-normal and leading-relaxed.
guidelines.overline: For small tags or labels (like 'VENUE TYPE' or 'RM ASSIGNED'), use uppercase text-xs with tracking-[0.1em] in DM Sans.
guidelines.buttons: Action texts (Primary CTAs, Tabs) must use DM Sans font-medium.

layout_and_spacing.mobile_first_rules: All new layouts must be mobile-first with native-app feel. Web-only sections (like massive footers) MUST be hidden on mobile (`hidden lg:block`). Content max-width should fill the screen tightly, with standard padding (px-4 or px-5) to maximize venue imagery.
layout_and_spacing.safe_areas: CRITICAL: The app layout MUST respect iPhone safe areas. Add `pt-[env(safe-area-inset-top)]` to the top header and `pb-[env(safe-area-inset-bottom)]` to the bottom tab bar.
layout_and_spacing.app_shell: The main wrapper should limit overflow on the document body to prevent native pull-to-refresh bouncing unless intentional. Add padding-bottom to the main scrolling container (e.g., `pb-24`) to ensure content is not hidden behind the Bottom Tab Bar.
layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: For the Explore and Favourites sections, utilize asymmetrical grids (tall cards mixed with square cards) rather than endless single-column scrolling. See E1 grid logic.
layout_and_spacing.headers: Mobile header must be compact: `h-12` or `h-14` (approx 48-56px). Do not use the 64-80px web header. Keep it sticky with `backdrop-blur-md`.
layout_and_spacing.footers: Remove the heavy footer on mobile (`hidden md:flex`). Move company/legal links to the 'Profile' tab.

bottom_tab_bar.structure: Fixed at `bottom-0`, `w-full`, `z-50`. Includes 5 tabs: Home, Explore, Favourites, My Requests, Profile.
bottom_tab_bar.style: Background `bg-[#0B0B0D]`. Active state: Gold icon & text. Inactive: Ivory/Gray with opacity. Include safe-area padding at the bottom.

floating_chat.style: Circular FAB, Solid Black or Gold.
floating_chat.positioning: CRITICAL: Position above the bottom tab bar and sticky CTAs. Standard offset: `bottom-[calc(5rem+env(safe-area-inset-bottom))] right-4`.

ctas.primary: Solid Gold (`bg-[#D4B36A]`) with Black text (`text-[#0B0B0D]`). Rounded corners (`rounded-full` or `rounded-xl`). No shadow, rely on color contrast.
ctas.secondary: Outline button with Gold border (`border border-[#D4B36A]`) and Gold text. Used for 'Connect' or secondary actions.
ctas.sticky_bottom_cta: On Venue Detail pages, place the 'Start Planning' CTA in a sticky bottom bar (`bottom-0 z-40 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border-t border-[#0B0B0D]/10 pt-4 pb-[calc(1rem+env(safe-area-inset-bottom))] px-4`).

rm_stepper_modal.style: Must feel like an iOS bottom sheet (`rounded-t-3xl`). Use a clean horizontal stepper (dots or thin lines) at the top. Keep content fixed-height with inner scrolling to avoid layout shifting. RM Cards should be horizontally scrollable `snap-x`.

venue_card.style: Immersive image-first approach. Remove heavy borders. Give the image an aspect ratio of 4:5 or 1:1. Overlap essential details (Price, Rating) on the image using a delicate gradient scrim (`bg-gradient-to-t from-black/80 to-transparent`).

motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use specific transforms. E.g., `transition-transform duration-300 ease-out` for the bottom sheet sliding up.
motion_and_interactions.active_states: Buttons must have `active:scale-95` to give native tactile feedback on tap.
motion_and_interactions.horizontal_scroll: Use `flex overflow-x-auto snap-x snap-mandatory scrollbar-hide` for RM selection and Venue Galleries. This mimics native horizontal swiping.

media_and_icons.icon_library: lucide-react. Use light weights if possible (`strokeWidth={1.5}`).
media_and_icons.image_handling: Always use `object-cover`. Add `bg-[#15151A]` as a fallback background color while images load to maintain the premium feel.

relationship_managers.description: Professional concierge woman in black suit
Professional man in suit and bow tie

accessibility.contrast: Ensure gold text on ivory background meets 4.5:1 ratio. If it fails, use Brand Black for text and gold for highlights.
accessibility.touch_targets: All clickable elements (icons, tabs) MUST be at least 44x44px.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="start-planning-cta"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: You are converting a web app to a mobile app. The desktop view should remain intact (use lg: hidden/block appropriately). Do NOT delete the desktop footer, just hide it on mobile.
Create the Bottom Tab Bar component and make it the primary shell layout wrapper for authenticated/main screens.
Refactor the main header to be compact (~44-48px) and sticky with a glassmorphism blur.
Refactor the Venue Detail page to have a fixed bottom CTA bar ('Start Planning') that floats above the bottom tab bar or replaces it on deeper navigation.
For the RM selection flow, build a clean bottom-sheet modal using Shadcn Dialog/Drawer with horizontal step progression.
Ensure the floating chat widget is dynamically positioned using calc() to never obscure tabs or sticky CTAs.
Use E1's 'Crystal Glass' rules for sticky bars: bg-black/90 with backdrop-blur-xl and a 1px border-t border-white/10.
Always use 'Cormorant Garamond' for Headers and 'DM Sans' for body text. DO NOT default to Inter.
Apply `data-testid` to all newly created or modified interactive elements.
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for sticky navigational elements.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. Always add transitions for specific properties.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; }.
Always use modern button styles (pill-shaped or moderately rounded xl) with tactile press animations (active:scale-95).
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons. Use lucide-react.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, click feedback. Static = dead.
Do not use generic gray borders everywhere. Use the brand's Ivory/Gold/Black tints for borders.
Use sonner for toasts, locate in /app/frontend/src/components/ui/sonner.js.
